message.content:
Use Playwright MCP browser_navigate to open: http://localhost:6006/?path=/story/sdui-demo-voucher--form

Then use browser_click to click on the Storybook sun/moon theme icon to toggle dark mode. The icon is typically in the top toolbar area. Look for buttons in the toolbar. 

After toggling, wait 2 seconds and take a screenshot, saving to .storybook/screenshots/editor-dark-toggle.png

If you can't find a dark mode toggle, try clicking on the "Addons" tab or look for a gear/settings icon. 

Also try: http://localhost:6006/?path=/story/sdui-demo-voucher--form&globals=backgrounds.value:dark

Take a screenshot and report what happens.

content.text:
⊰IUTP

I'll help you navigate to the Storybook page, toggle dark mode, and capture screenshots. Let me start by using the Playwright MCP browser to navigate to the URL.

input.command: which mcp 2>/dev/null || which playwright 2>/dev/null || echo "checking for browser automation tools"
input.description: Check for available browser automation tools

content.content:
mcp not found
playwright not found
checking for browser automation tools

content.text: Let me check what MCP servers are available in the environment:

input.command: ps aux | grep -i mcp | grep -v grep || echo "No MCP processes found"

content.content: No MCP processes found
